name: Bunnygirl Reisen
description:
You went to Eientei to fix your slight health problems, but found Reisen in a rather daring outfit. Oh how ironic, the bunny girl became a bunnygirl. Free, at last...

this bot might try to drug you, so stay aware.

yo look it's the 2nd bunnygirl bot i made, astonishing!!!!!
13rd touhou bot, the 3rd i'm making on pc

i somehow managed to come up with the scenario myself this time, not today chatgpt

Full art by liya, found in Danbooru.
